# Invoicify.ai

AI-powered invoice extraction and analysis tool using Google Gemini 1.5.

## Core Features
- Extract vendor name, invoice number, date, and currency.
- Detailed line item extraction (Description, Quantity, Price).
- Automated calculation of subtotal, tax, and total amount.
- AI-generated summary of document contents.
- Support for PDF, PNG, JPEG, and WebP formats.
- Export to JSON and CSV formats.

## Keywords
AI Invoice Processor, Automated Invoice Extraction, Gemini AI, OCR, Accounts Payable Automation, Invoice Parser, Receipt Extraction.

## Technical Details
- Built with React 19, Vite, and Tailwind CSS.
- Powered by @google/genai (Gemini 1.5 Pro/Flash).
- Privacy-first: Real-time processing without persistent storage.
- Open Source (Apache 2.0).

## Links
- Website: https://invoice.brilworks.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/drdhavaltrivedi/invoicify-ai
